resultList.dtldesc: Live luxuriously with this stunning 3 BHK builder floor for sale in the upscale locality of Palam Vihar, Gurgaon. With comfort and convenience in mind, this residence offers a rich blend of sophisticated amenities and serene resident surroundings.::::Property Specifications::::This fashionably constructed 3 BHK builder floor with roof rights in Palam Vihar is a perfect balance of relaxation, space, and nature and a perfect dwelling for families in pursuit of convenience as well as peace. Located on the 2nd floor of a well-maintained 2-story building, the property is surrounded by lovely natural vistas and open roads from its numerous balconies, providing a peaceful living atmosphere.::::Spread over a spacious carpet area of 1400 sqft, the house is semi-furnished with built-in cupboards, well-designed to utilize the storage space to its fullest without occupying much space. The living-dining area lets in sunshine and air, along with the cozy and cheerful atmosphere. The modular kitchen, provided with a utility area and gas pipeline connection, facilitates cooking with ease and convenience on a daily basis. There is a special store room to optimize the usage of the layout such that there is ample space to store household necessities.::::The house boasts three tastefully decorated bedrooms, each opening out to balconies for the joy of living in the outdoors and inhaling fresh air. The three bathrooms are equipped with contemporary western fixtures and geysers for use throughout the year. The floors are stunningly covered with vitrified tiles, blending longevity with a chic appearance. Being North-West facing, this house is Vaastu compliant, ensuring harmonious flow of positive energy and a perfectly balanced home.::::Facilities::::The property provides a variety of basic facilities to make living comfortable and safe. It has one covered parking lot along with another open parking space for guests and residents. The residents have uninterrupted supply of water 24 hours a day, complemented by a 100% power backup system to manage any disruption smoothly. Security is properly catered to with a professional guard on site and CCTV cameras being placed around the building, offering peace of mind and security for all residents.::::Locality::::The locality around this property is well-serviced with required amenities and facilities. Schools and hospitals are nearby, making it family-friendly and providing ease of access to healthcare and education. Shoppings centers and malls are easily accessible, and buses and cars are easily available for shopping and commuting at ease. Public transport amenities are close by, providing ease of connectivity to the rest of the city. Banks and ATMs are within a kilometer, and the closest railway station is 6 kilometers away, making traveling to work and banking an easy experience.::
